arts.ttl: 'It'll be tough': Gary Neville drops fresh Nottingham Forest prediction ahead of crucial Arsenal and Man City clashes
Arsenal receive EXCELLENT news on top target despite Barcelona interest
arts.sum: Barcelona have an interest in goalkeeper Joan Garcia, but Arsenal remain best-positioned to sign him, according to Spanish media. This is good news for Arsenal, as is the revelation that Espanyol will likely have to sell Garcia in the summer.

arts.ttl: ‘Definitely not his fault’: BBC pundit says £25m Arsenal player was blameless in West Ham loss
arts.sum: Arsenal lost ground in the title race over the weekend as they lost to West Ham United while Liverpool beat Manchester City. Alan Shearer reckons...

arts.ttl: Beating Arsenal and Tottenham could be ‘icing on the cake’ – Icon sees tough European nights on the way for both
arts.sum: PSV Eindhoven and AZ Alkmaar wins against Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur would be the ‘icing on the cake’ for Dutch clubs in Europe this season. That’s according to Ruud Gullit in his column for De Telegraaf, via Soccer News, who believes both teams are more than capable of knocking their English counterparts out of Europe The post Beating Arsenal and Tottenham could be ‘icing on the cake’ – Icon sees tough European nights on the way for both appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.sum: It looks like it’s going to be another frustrating season for Arsenal. Indeed, the Gunners look condemned for another second-place finish, despite the fact their...

arts.ttl: Southampton saw £6m bid to sign forward rejected in 2019, now he's a £50m star wanted by Arsenal
Arsenal: Mikel Arteta 'to accept' Premier League title failure as Gunners pray for 1998 repeat
arts.sum: Arsenal have not had the look of a Premier League title-winning side all season long, and their chances of glory are now officially over, expert Charles Watts says.

arts.ttl: Forgotten Arsenal star sends Mikel Arteta clear message with £30m issue further exposed
arts.sum: Arsenal loannee Fabio Vieira has shown Mikel Arteta exactly what he is missing with his performance in Porto's most recent Portuguese league game. Technically, Martin Odegaard is a fantastic footballer but Arteta needs more from him in front of goal especially with Saka absent.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel holds Ben White England talks ahead of international lifeline for Arsenal star
arts.sum: New England boss Thomas Tuchel has held talks with Arsenal defender Ben White ahead of next month's round of international fixtures. The German head coach, who started his role in an official capacity on January 1, admitted he would hold talks with the defender at the World Cup draw back in December.
